steps.title: Spot the result
steps.content: The passage says carbon levels rise and the audio is correspondingly distorted. The next clause explains what follows from that distortion: listeners can hear changes in carbon levels.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: Choice A merely adds information, Choice B signals a comparison, and Choice C introduces an example. The remaining transition signals a result, which fits the cause-effect relationship between distortion and listeners' perception. The answer is D.
